# Bakery

> The professional-grade toolkit for home bakers. Store recipes, track every variation with precision, and master the science behind every loaf.

Bakery is a web application for at-home bakers who want to document and improve their baking. Users can create a personal recipe journal, log multiple iterations of each recipe, track what changed between bakes (hydration, salt percentage, timing, technique), and see how their results evolved over time.

## Features

- **Recipe Journal**: Store and organize all your recipes in one place. Each recipe (called a "baked good") can have many iterations so you can experiment freely without losing previous versions.
- **Iteration Tracking**: Log each bake with notes, difficulty rating, total time, and photos. Compare iterations to understand what worked and what didn't.
- **Baker's Math Calculator**: Calculate baker's percentages instantly. Enter your flour weight and all other ingredients scale proportionally. Available at `/tools/calculator`.
- **Ingredient Substitutions**: Search a curated database of common baking ingredient substitutions. Never let a missing ingredient stop a bake. Available at `/tools/substitutions`.
- **Community Bakes**: Browse recipes shared publicly by other bakers in the community.

## Public Tools (no login required)

- Baker's Math Calculator: https://www.thebakery.app/tools/calculator
- Ingredient Substitutions: https://www.thebakery.app/tools/substitutions

## Tech Stack

- Next.js (App Router) frontend hosted at https://www.thebakery.app
- Convex real-time backend for data storage
- Clerk for authentication

## Optional

- Sitemap: https://www.thebakery.app/sitemap.xml
